name: Matrix Exponentiation (Fibonacci)
description: Compute F(n) using matrix exponentiation: [[1,1],[1,0]]^n gives Fibonacci numbers in O(log n).
intuition: Encode recurrence as matrix multiplication. F(n) = (M^n)[0][1]. Use fast power (squaring) on matrices: O(log n) matrix multiplications, each O(1) for 2×2. Same trick works for any linear recurrence.
